Query.Sql: select distinct Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreLinkageDiagnosticDetails.ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis' as DateOfPrimaryDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed, Record ->> '$.Haematological.HaematologicalCore.HaematologicalCoreClinicalNurseSpecialistAndRiskFactorAssessments.AlcoholHistoryCancerInLastThreeMonths.@code' as AlcoholHistoryCancerInLastThreeMonths from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81 where type = 'HA' and NhsNumber is not null and AlcoholHistoryCancerInLastThreeMonths is not null and DateOfPrimaryDiagnosisClinicallyAgreed is not null;

Explanation.Description: The date the Primary Cancer was confirmed or the Primary Cancer diagnosis was clinically agreed.
Explanation.Origin: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED)

Explanation.Description: Current history of alcohol consumption for the patient during a cancer care spell.
Explanation.Origin: ALCOHOL HISTORY (CANCER IN LAST THREE MONTHS)
